title: Floral Crunchy Chinese Potato Dish
description: A crispy and flavorful dish made with new potatoes for a nostalgic Polish-inspired snack that's also low in fodmap content.

ingredients.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Alternatively use a non-fodmap neutral oil like avocado or safflower oil

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Mince finely after peeling and chopping into halves

instructions: Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C). Rinse the new potatoes under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large mixing bowl, combine olive oil, minced garlic, and chopped chives. Mix thoroughly until evenly distributed in the dressing.
Gently add the peeled and halved new potatoes to the dressing, ensuring they are well coated with the mixture. Toss gently but firmly so all of them absorb the seasoning.
Transfer the seasoned potatoes onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy clean-up. Arrange them in a single layer to ensure even cooking.
Broil the dish for about 12 minutes, or until they reach a golden-brown crust on top and are crispy throughout. Flip occasionally during the broiling process to ensure consistent browning.
Remove from oven once ready. Let it rest for a couple of minutes before serving hot as a snack with your favorite accompaniments.
